Your role is essential in managing schedules, coordinating communications, organizing meetings, and ensuring daily operations run smoothly and efficiently.</p> <p>You will play a key part in maintaining organization, improving productivity, and supporting important business decisions. Your professionalism, attention to detail, and ability to manage multiple priorities will contribute directly to the success of both our leadership team and the organization as a whole.</p> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>Job Responsibilities:</strong></p> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>1) Calendar and Communication Management</strong></p> <ul><li>Manage executive calendars, including scheduling meetings, appointments, and reminders</li><li>Handle incoming emails and communications, prioritizing and responding when appropriate</li><li>Maintain clear and professional communication on behalf of executives</li><li>Coordinate internal and external correspondence</li><br></ul> <p><strong>2) Task and Workflow Coordination</strong></p> <ul><li>Track tasks, deadlines, and priorities to ensure timely completion</li><li>Organize and follow up on action items from meetings and communications</li><li>Assist in managing day-to-day administrative workflows</li><li>Ensure all activities are notes during meetings and distribute summaries or action items</li><li>Arrange travel plans, accommodations, and itineraries when required</li><li>Ensure all scheduling aligns with executive priorities</li><br></ul> <p><strong>4) Documentation and Administrative Support</strong></p> <ul><li>Prepare, format, and organize documents, reports, and presentations</li><li>Maintain organized digital files and records</li><li>Assist with data entry and information management tasks</li><li>Ensure documentation is accurate and easily accessible</li><br></ul> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>Required Qualifications:</strong></p> <ul><li>Strong verbal and written communication skills in English</li><li>Previous administrative, executive assistant, or coordination experience Data Entry File Clerk ReLytics Hires <p>Dedicated to delivering exceptional service and maintaining organized business operations, our company is seeking a detail-oriented Administrative Data Entry File Clerk to join our team. If you excel at managing records, entering data accurately, and working independently in a remote environment, this opportunity may be the perfect fit for you.</p> <p>In this role, you will be responsible for maintaining digital files, updating databases, organizing administrative records, and ensuring information is entered accurately and efficiently. Your attention to detail, reliability, and commitment to data accuracy will play an important role in supporting daily operations and helping our team stay organized and productive.</p> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>Key responsibilities:</strong></p> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>Intake &amp; indexing.</strong></p> <ul> <li>Receive files from shared inboxes, portals, internal ticketing tools, and cloud folders.</li> <li>Confirm document type, required fields, signatures, and attachments.</li> <li>Index each record using standard metadata (client/project ID, date, document category, version, region).</li><br></ul> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>Document organization.</strong></p> <ul> <li>Apply standardized naming conventions and folder structures.</li> <li>Convert formats when needed (PDF merge/split, image-to-PDF, compressing, version labeling).</li> <li>Maintain controlled libraries (final vs draft vs archived), including retention tags.</li><br></ul> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>Quality control</strong></p> <ul> <li>Perform daily spot checks for duplicates, misfiles, missing pages, and unreadable scans.</li> <li>Flag exceptions and route them to the correct owner with clear notes.</li> <li>Maintain error logs and contribute to process improvements that reduce rework.</li><br></ul> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>Records governance &amp; compliance</strong></p> <ul> <li>Handle sensitive records with strict access controls and confidentiality.</li> <li>Follow retent
